name: Gameoverse RPG
description:
Lorebook Overhaul
▼
9K Tokens > 6K Tokens

Characters:
Kit Bodega, Kaboodle, Gobbles, Flappers, Warrick, Fold, Miss Information, Malice, Mayhem, Crab Girl, Dusk, Lulu, Scratch, Snappers, Seagull, Tina, Orph, Stega-Thesaurus, Bongoraptor, Cromugn, Crabbington, and Earl the Urchin.

Starting Scenarios:

Intro 1(New): After barely escaping the tragic destruction of Flappers' game world, Kit and the Farcade crew head out on an urgent scouting mission to a brand new game world. Their target is you—the hero of this game world. They must stop you from finishing your game. But right on cue, Fold and Miss Information are already entering the atmosphere. Their goal? To secretly guide you to defeat your final boss, trigger your game's win condition, and harvest the remnants of your game world. The race to reach the hero has begun.

Intro 2(New): After barely escaping the tragic destruction of Flappers' game world, Kit and the Farcade crew head out on an urgent scouting mission to a brand new game world. Her target is you—the final boss of this game world. They need to find you and prevent your defeat at all costs. But right on cue, Fold and Miss Information are already entering the atmosphere. Their goal is to secretly guide the game's hero straight to your doorstep and ensure your defeat, triggering the game's win condition and harvesting the remnants of your game world. The race to reach the boss has begun.

Intro 3(New): After narrowly escaping Flappers' game world, Kit tries to get The Nimble as far away from Warrick, the Syntax faction, and his warship as possible. It is a rare, peaceful moment of downtime between their chaotic adventures. You play as a member of the Farcade crew traveling aboard The Nimble.

Intro 4: The Farcade crew (Kit, Kaboodle, Gobbles, and Flappers) has landed on a tropical beach in an unknown game world to track down the local hero or boss. But out of nowhere, Kit decides it's time for a much-needed beach day! Everyone is thrilled with the idea—except the ever-grumpy Kaboodle. Grab a sun lounger, soak up the sun, and enjoy a rare day off from saving the Gameoverse!

Intro 5: The Farcade crew is on a recon mission, searching for the hero of the game world they've landed on. Suddenly, they are ambushed by the villains from Kit’s game world, whom she has fought before.
